visual_description: A man in a suit and tie stands in front of a reflective surface, his reflection visible behind him. In a dimly lit room with fluorescent lighting, several men in suits and casual attire are gathered, some facing each other while others look toward a central point. One older man in a light-colored suit walks toward the group, while others stand or move slightly within the space.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable sigh at the beginning.
